item.title: Just putting this here so it does not get lost
item.description: A sitting congressman, Ted Lieu, said on the record the Epstein files are being blocked because they show Trump raped and threatened to kill children. Keep sharing this so it doesn’t get buried.

item.title: Dump of satisfying things to start the weekend. Be Happy !
item.description:
Last one blew up… now here’s a robot doing aerial yoga... for reasons.
the closest we ever got to achieving world peace ...
Pool scratcher.
Vintage paper cutter.
Turning a frozen lake into a working boat in Germany.
The beavers won't be very amused...
Great construction.
Cheater !
Opening a barrel of fermenting peppers, with a garlic topping.
Popcorn time the old fashioned way.
Lame.
London’s best focaccia sandwich.
He was surgical with that mango.
Bro mastered the hoverboard.
A giant perfect flan.
Zero survival skills and a mind full of curiosity.
Not the hero this city deserves, but the hero this city needs.
Tractor Powered by a Ferrari Engine.
What is this car (or truck) that warned you not to put a phone there ? This design is ridiculously stupid !
Drywall taper Taping and jointing.
This Is Why You Wear A Helmet.
Satisfying Gardening clean up.
Whatever he did wrong I hope she forgives him.
Guide dogs are on an entirely different level. He secured a seat for his human without a single command.
A Nice Tool not only for mechanics.
Japans Automated Bike Garage.
Nokia used to build very cool devices.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Ukrainians hacked yesterday's secret meeting of the Russian Ministry of Industry and Trade on drone production.
item.description:
Never invade a country full of smart people who speak your language. "Your fucking faces have all been recorded, so gentleman, watch your backs. Yes, yes, you, the bald guy, first and foremost".
Russians cited problems in obtaining even basic components, all now being reliant on China. Russians laugh that they now have to even import copper wire and plastic.

item.dc:creator: UncleMartha

item.title: Mint
item.description: A federal law passed in 1866 explicitly prohibits living people from appearing on U.S. currency. It's not a grey area. It's not open to interpretation. It's been sitting in the books for over 150 years. The last time this actually happened was 1926 when a coin featuring Calvin Coolidge was minted while he was still alive and serving as president. The backlash was immediate. The coins were pulled. And the law was reaffirmed. Now this retired lawyer has filed a federal lawsuit against the U.S. Mint, not because of who is on the coin, but because the law says it simply cannot be done. Full stop. No political agenda. No protest. Just one guy, a dusty legal statute, and a federal case that apparently nobody in tRump's regime saw coming.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Just a Timely Reminder This Picture Does Exist- Elected- Twice- as President, even after its Publication
item.description:
Photo from Politico [Maybe Trump has his hand under Ivanka's dress to heal her? Physician, heal thyself. He also seems to be holding her against himself, bending her over the table slightly. What would the Pope say? /s] We see you for what you are. New evidence corroborating claim by victim Trump had sex with her age 13. https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/evidence-corroborates-claims-trump-sex-084613031.html Mounting evidence for the picture that Trump and Epstein were underage girl traffickers, perhaps blackmailers, and even spies. Eric Trump said Trump had all the Russian money they wanted. Trump said his sexual boasting about assault in the Access Hollywood Tapes was "locker room talk" and he used Russian money to buy locker rooms- and golf clubs. Trump's pal David Pecker of The Enquirer was also a blackmailer- maybe even of JFK Jr. https://time.com/7322750/epstein-blackmail-lutnick-allegations/ From the man that enjoyed fantasizing in public about sex with his daughter- and self-confessed serial sexual predator. https://www.lemonde.fr/en/united-states/article/2024/04/15/trump-access-hollywood-tape-transcript-can-be-shown-in-trial-judge-rules_6668512_133.html# https://www.rollingstone.com/politics/politics-features/a-timeline-of-donald-trumps-creepiness-while-he-owned-miss-universe-191860/ Trump said he was mad at Epstein for "stealing his girls" https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cyvn7ee3539o, Epstein allegedly arranged a "calendar party" for Trump at Mar-a-Lago. Trump ran a "Miss Teen USA" pageant and walked into the girls' dressing room. https://www.imdb.com/news/ni60357121/ Trump allegedly has sex with a 13 yo girl. Trump told law enforcement he knew of Epstein's illegal behavior. https://www.imdb.com/news/ni60357121/ https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Donald_Trump_sexual_misconduct_ Spies? Bold allegation. Not really. Well documented Trump theft/hiding classified docs. New info says Trump kept secret docs for his personal financial, business i.e. espionage since Trump has extensive foreign govt. financial ties and entanglements. Also COIN war against US citizens for partisan, personal gain i.e. civil war, treason, https://www.newyorker.com/news/letter-from-trumps-washington/did-trump-just-declare-war-on-the-american-left https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/trump-kept-classified-docs-tied-121919334.html Former AG Robert Mueller was convinced Trump was a Russian asset. The Russians helped elect Trump. A Russian researcher helped UK far-Right Tories and Brexit fixers in Cambridge Analytica related to parent company/ alleged MI6 contractor SCL Elections, along with Oligarch Zuckerberg/Facebook fix Trump's 2016 election; they boasted they fixed over 100 elections world-wide. https://qz.com/1239762/cambridge-analytica-scandal-all-the-countries-where-scl-elections-claims-to-have-worked Trump certainly seems to defer to both Russia's Putin and Netanyahu to the detriment of US interests. https://www.axios.com/2025/09/12/trump-response-russia-drones-israel-qatar https://www.wsj.com/politics/national-security/trump-reluctant-to-pressure-putin-and-netanyahu-risks-sidelining-himself-ffded6e7 Epstein Honey Trap-Google Maxwell's father, Israel ties https://www.timesofisrael.com/for-writer-who-broke-epstein-case-a-rumored-mossad-link-is-worth-digging-into http://www.rollingstone.com/culture/culture-features/jeffrey-epstein-steven-hoffenberg-intelligence-agencies-spy-1197708/ http://www.jpost.com/israel-news/jeffrey-epstein-may-have-had-links-to-israeli-leaders-the-rolling-stone-674244 www.nytimes.com/2019/08/12/business/jeffrey-epstein-interview.html https://imgur.com/gallery/arpNy8U Pecker tried to blackmail Bezos, allegedly called in JFK Jr's debt just before JFK Jr's "accidental" death. Pecker had a safe full of alleged kompromat the FBI raided. Did a government backed his ops too? https://www.townandcountrymag.com/society/money-and-power/a26257364/david-pecker-national-enquirer-facts/ https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/4647649-david-pecker-was-swatted-the-day-he-testified-in-trump-trial-report/ https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2019/feb/09/jeff-bezos-trump-national-enquirer-amazon-david-pecker Trump was mobster according to consiglieri Cohen https://www.imdb.com/news/ni63011740/ http://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2018/dec/12/national-enquirer-trump-payments-david-pecker-catch-and-kill Trumps grandfather ran a whore house https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frederick_Trump Melania was allegedly a "model" with Epstein/ Epstein's partner of Victoria's Secret now employed under Trump by the US taxpayers. Depending on who you believe. "Trump liked to F#ck his friends wives." https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/man-links-melania-directly-epstein-220655135.html https://docs.house.gov/meetings/JU/JU08/20250227/117951/HHRG-119-JU08-20250227-SD006-U6.pdf Trump is "the most dangerous man in the world" according to PhD psychologist and Trump's niece, who he allegedly cheated out of an inheritance, Dr. Mary Trump. He's a malignant Narcissist and Dark Triad sociopath. The weapons he uses are manipulation, psychological and emotional. He's high level criminally insane, a mobster according to his consiglieri Cohen. https://imgur.com/gallery/worlds-most-dangerous-man-now-threatening-civilizational-genocide-LGEtPMMp War crimes and the "Bonesaw Club" https://www.972mag.com/lavender-ai-israeli-army-gaza/ https://www.theguardian.com/world/2024/apr/03/israel-gaza-ai-database-hamas-airstrikes https://www.democracynow.org/2024/4/5/israel_ai https://foreignpolicy.com/2024/05/02/israel-military-artificial-intelligence-targeting-hamas-gaza-deaths-lavender/ https://www.business-humanrights.org/es/últimas-noticias/palantir-allegedly-enables-israels-ai-targeting-amid-israels-war-in-gaza-raising-concerns-over-war/ The World's Most Dangerous Man Tip of the Iceberg- how could a political party, a leading country elect such a compromised and sick man- twice? The answer is that the Right, GOP, Right-wing politicized Intel, Oligarchs are as sick as Trump- he is their rightful leader NOT an abberation. "Dark Tetrad Traits: Research published in journals like Personality and Individual Differences has explored links between "Dark Tetrad" traits (narcissism, Machiavellianism, psychopathy, and sadism) and various political leanings. This research associates these traits with right-wing orientation or extremism..." https://jspp.psychopen.eu/index.php/jspp/article/view/5209/5209.html https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2405844017316882 https://imgur.com/gallery/worlds-most-dangerous-man-now-threatening-civilizational-genocide-LGEtPMM Since slavery, Jim Crow, eugenics, Native American genocide, and colonialism, secret COIN warfare against blacks and the Left rationalized as "national security". The pretext of "national security" used to preempt the Constitution, by the Right to wage war on the majority, increasingly seize authoritarian control https://progressivereform.org/cpr-blog/first-emergency-then-abuse-of-power/ https://www.brennancenter.org/our-work/analysis-opinion/emergency-powers-system-vulnerable-executive-abuse https://www.amacad.org/daedalus/supreme-court-unaccountable-racialized-security-state https://www.aclu.org/news/national-security/do-us-politicians-need-fear-our-intelligence https://truthout.org/audio/the-fbi-appears-to-be-engaged-in-a-modern-day-version-of-cointelpro/
https://imgur.com/gallery/who-is-winning-war-on-iran-follow-money-HsXpSRu https://imgur.com/gallery/reminder-bonesaw-club-ongoing-right-wing-unitary-executive-doctrine-of-presidential-power-immunity-since-1980-bush-sr-doj-ag-barr-LhbfJBr https://imgur.com/gallery/us-midterms-2022-key-candidates-who-once-again-threaten-democracy-new-guardian-report-CuMdp8l https://imgur.com/gallery/russia-saudis-pull-october-surprise-oil-supply-cuts-to-increase-inflation-again-like-with-carter-wapo-bloomberg-report-M5IVzbq
https://imgur.com/gallery/watch-trump-to-pull-netanyahu-far-behind-polls-facing-trial-corruption-mass-protests-against-his-long-dubious-violent-reign-x8Fw3p2 https://imgur.com/gallery/new-guardian-report-describes-israeli-bomb-targeting-ai-system-allowing-15-100-civilian-deaths-per-each-37-000-targets-HxPGELW https://imgur.com/gallery/jd-vances-mentor-peter-theil-founded-palantir-with-cia-how-us-intelligence-palantir-feed-israel-s-killing-machine-gaza-ZkbQINX https://imgur.com/gallery/jd-vance-peter-theil-right-wing-cia-contractor-oligarch-who-sponsored-him-arpNy8U
https://imgur.com/gallery/trump-again-praised-cunning-of-president-vladimir-v-putin-of-russia-new-nytimes-reporting-jizCaRs https://imgur.com/gallery/real-national-security-crisis-isnt-ukraine-thats-clever-distraction-peNrf1z
Oligarchy And finally the Intel contractor Oligarchs. Musk won Trump his re-election, then stole unlimited private data. Theil too, Vance's sponsor. Google Palantir and Operation Lavender, Gaza and now Iran civilian targeting. And in the USA too against the Left, Blacks, "enemies" like Progressives and Dems. Yes, it really IS this bad. Biden warned us about the Oligarchs. US is an Oligarchy: Harvard Study. https://www.hks.harvard.edu/faculty-research/policycast/oligarchy-open-what-happens-now-us-forced-confront-its-plutocracy https://imgur.com/gallery/jd-vances-mentor-peter-theil-founded-palantir-with-cia-how-us-intelligence-palantir-feed-israel-s-killing-machine-gaza-ZkbQINX https://imgur.com/gallery/jd-vance-peter-theil-right-wing-cia-contractor-oligarch-who-sponsored-him-arpNy8U https://imgur.com/gallery/new-guardian-report-describes-israeli-bomb-targeting-ai-system-allowing-15-100-civilian-deaths-per-each-37-000-targets-HxPGELW COIN warfare "disruption" is torture https://imgur.com/gallery/torture-ice-private-detention-centers-bSU3TeW https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-im-victim-of-severe-human-rights-abuse-torture-poisoning-t8Eyx6o https://imgur.com/gallery/mlk-day-is-also-about-truth-reconciliation-about-us-government-abuse-of-power-WTViMK2 Asymmetrical political war by US Intel against the majority aka treason, civil war https://imgur.com/gallery/who-was-robert-mueller-really-bush-iraq-war-us-partisan-intel-warfare-co-conspirator-letting-trumps-russian-election-interference-slide-CbathV7 https://imgur.com/gallery/william-barr-u-s-attorney-general-top-law-enforcement-officer-gives-congress-finger-O9yKdsy https://imgur.com/gallery/isnt-time-to-revisit-epstein-death-custody-given-trumps-other-criminal-investigations-9wQy4aO https://imgur.com/gallery/both-sides-both-sides-intels-new-centrism-targets-both-far-left-far-right-msnbc-tonight-uPWjl1c https://imgur.com/gallery/alarm-as-koch-bankrolls-dozens-of-election-denier-candidates-new-guardian-report-3Gt9QNs https://imgur.com/gallery/other-rico-criminal-enterprise-that-needs-investigation-gDAY7aB Insurrection and Graft https://imgur.com/gallery/147-congressmen-have-disqualified-themselves-from-office-supporting-trump-coup-PpiLOOn https://imgur.com/gallery/scalia-law-school-george-mason-university-funnels-special-interest-money-travel-perks-to-scotus-justices-exchange-clerkships-nytimes-report-31K5gZ8 https://imgur.com/gallery/ultra-conservative-gala-welcomes-supreme-court-justices-who-ended-roe-v-wade-guardian-bLTm4ae Brutality and racism https://imgur.com/gallery/5-sheriff-deputies-policeman-calling-themselves-goon-squad-torture-shoot-2-black-men-90-minutes-living-with-white-woman-KDe58Ik https://imgur.com/gallery/4-weeks-after-gop-attacks-manhattan-da-alvin-bragg-who-is-prosecuting-trump-subway-vigilante-goes-to-braggs-gop-challenger-after-killing-ZtE7TCv https://imgur.com/gallery/silver-spring-md-police-suggested-5-year-old-boy-was-beast-who-needed-to-be-put-crate-report-from-lawsuit-on-police-response-to-troubled-kindergartner-WFtK9dQ Sociopaths https://imgur.com/gallery/right-are-increasingly-controlled-by-sociopathic-element-desantis-reported-torturer-threatens-to-start-slitting-throats-3nU6KsO item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Cancer update
item.description: After around a year of fighting, they are finally going in to remove my cancer. Unfortunately, its likely going to cost me my large intestine and my bladder. The large intestine has to come out due to a genetic condition that got found during all this. The bladder got infiltrated by the cancer, so it has to at least partially go. If they take so much of my bladder, there is a chance they take it all, and give me a bag on my gut for urine. On top of that, there is a chsnce they have to take my prostate with it. There is a chance, on taking my large intestine, that they might be able to connect the small to my rectum. Doctor said chances are, im going to have two bags on my abdomen. One for poop, one for pee. I look at my future prospects, and am terrified. What job would take me, with the issues im likely to have? If they take my prostate, im not going to be much use to a woman beyond lips and fingers. As well, never really wanted kids, but there is a good chance this removes that entirely as an option. I look to the future...but see no reason to even want to survive this surgery. I don't want to die....but what is left to live for? Sorry for the depressed rant...been screaming into the void for a year....im just tired.
item.dc:creator: JustinArnold
